claim_bullets.bullet_text: There are 12 types of monsters in Alecrast, based on Laverna's classification (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.170-171)
Spirits are energy beings involved in life's activities, unaffected by poisons, illnesses, or mental attacks (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.170-171)
Some spirits appear as mad spirits, extremely dangerous and destructive (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.170-171)

source_record_text: There are 12 types of monsters in Alecrast, based on the types set by Laverna, the famous witch of Orphan, who compiled the _Natural History of Alecrast_.
